title: Will Trump make 0 trips to Mar-a-Lago as President in Jun 2026?

current.lean_note: I lean YES (my prob 88%) but it isn't +EV at the ask — no value bet (betting the other side would contradict my forecast).
current.rationale_summary: Mar-a-Lago is seasonally closed in summer (Trump made zero June visits in every first-term year), zero trips have occurred through mid-June, and Iran-war management plus G7 travel keep him DC-anchored, making 0 trips the strongly modal outcome.
key_drivers: Iran war keeps him in DC
